equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the port decodes AgentRuntime numeric values 0, 1, and 2 and rejects other uint16 values, but no audited local repo maps those variants to the required API strings zeroclaw, openclaw, and hermes.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing AgentRuntime API string mapping from ZeroClaw/OpenClaw/Hermes to zeroclaw/openclaw/hermes in the audited port/dependency repos.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-precompile-codecs/src/persistent_agent.rs defines AgentRuntime::{ZeroClaw, OpenClaw, Hermes} with repr(u16) values 0, 1, and 2.
TryFrom<u16> for AgentRuntime rejects other values with CodecError::InvalidFieldValue for agent_runtime.

No to_api_string/as_api/API-string mapping for AgentRuntime exists in the audited repo set; the only matching to_api_string found locally is in /home/ritual/repos/ritual-reth-internal, which is outside the audited repo set.

rationale: The candidate defines the effective ABI contract for AgentRuntime numeric values and API string mapping. It is current as stated and has no in-cluster predecessor or successor candidate.
statement: AgentRuntime decoding must accept only uint16 values 0, 1, and 2 as ZeroClaw, OpenClaw, and Hermes, map those variants to API strings zeroclaw, openclaw, and hermes, and reject any other uint16 value.
suggested_falsification_tests: Decode persistent agent payloads with agent_runtime values 0, 1, and 2 and assert they map to ZeroClaw, OpenClaw, and Hermes and expose API strings zeroclaw, openclaw, and hermes.
Decode a persistent agent payload with agent_runtime value 3 and assert decoding returns InvalidFieldValue for agent_runtime.
summary: AgentRuntime numeric validation is present, but the required API string mapping is missing.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Decode agent_runtime values 0, 1, 2, and 3; the first three decode and value 3 rejects, but any code requiring runtime.to_api_string() or equivalent string emission is absent in the audited repos.
title: AgentRuntime values are explicit and validated
